productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid DK.Grey Shirts
description: CompositionDark grey shirt made of 97% cotton and 3% spandex, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, tipped collar with a front buttoned placket, embroidered brand logo on the left chest and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees/delicate dry clean/delicate professional wash with waterDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryHang dry in shadeCool ironA perfect addition to your everyday formal wear, this shirt from united colors of benetton looks fab when teamed with formal and semi-formal trousers and classy accessories. Crafted from soft cotton-spandex fabric, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit, while the long sleeves keep the winter chill at bay.
